overall.description: A slow panoramic view from inside a luxury modern apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, looking out through floor-to-ceiling windows at a sunlit terrace with palm trees and lounge furniture. The camera pans left across a bar counter with various objects including a handgun, passing a distinctive sculptural potted tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment interior with panoramic terrace view

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the camera left to take in the view of the terrace and interior details

entered.detail: artistically pruned tree in a square planter on the counter
floor-to-ceiling window wall providing view of outdoor terrace
dark polished counter running along the window wall
various items including bottles, a revolver, and electronic devices
white sun umbrellas shading lounge chairs on the terrace
tropical palm trees visible outside on the terrace
contemporary architecture visible in the background beyond the terrace

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a sleek, modern luxury apartment with the camera slowly panning left across a polished bar counter. A distinctive sculptural potted tree stands prominently on the left, while through the panoramic glass windows, a sunlit terrace with white lounge umbrellas and palm trees is visible. Various objects including a handgun rest on the counter, and modern buildings can be seen in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous pan across a high-end interior that reveals a sun-drenched urban oasis beyond the glass. It begins inside a sleek, modern luxury apartment, gliding across a polished bar counter where various objects, including a handgun, are laid out. As the camera moves left, it passes a distinctive sculptural potted tree that frames the view of the outdoors. The scene then expands through panoramic floor-to-ceiling windows to reveal a bright terrace featuring white lounge umbrellas and palm trees. Finally, the perspective opens further to show the distant silhouettes of modern buildings under a clear, sunlit sky.
